evidence.quote: Complete countries & regions data from the iso-codes Debian package
Before submitting a PR that modifies geographical data, please read the Wiki on how to do this properly. This will save everyone a lot of time, and get your PR merged quicker!
Carmen is designed to make it easy to access Country and region data. Clean API
A repository of geographic regions for Ruby
Overriding structural data: You might want to tweak the data that Carmen provides for a variety of reasons
